structured_payload_candidate.title: Active Primary Airflow Endpoints by Zone Group Mode
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: 5.9.4 Endpoints as a Function of Zone Group Mode
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Series Fan-Powered Terminal Unit − Constant-Volume Fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Cooling maximum endpoint is Vcool-max in Occupied, Cooldown, Setup modes, and 0 in Warmup, Setback, Unoccupied. Minimum endpoint is Vmin in Occupied mode and 0 in all other modes.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Set active primary airflow setpoint endpoints as per table.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote:
Active endpoints used in the control logic depicted in Figure 5.9.5 shall vary depending on the mode of the Zone Group  the zone is a part of (see Table 5.9.4).
Table 5.9.4 Endpoints  as a Function of Zone Group  Mode
Endpoint  Occupied  Cooldown  Setup  Warmup  Setback  Unoccupied
Cooling maximum  Vcool -max Vcool -max Vcool -max 0 0 0
Minimum  Vmin*  0 0 0 0 0

evidence_quote:
Active endpoints used in the control logic depicted in Figure 5.9.5 shall vary depending on the mode of the Zone Group  the zone is a part of (see Table 5.9.4).
Table 5.9.4 Endpoints  as a Function of Zone Group  Mode
Endpoint  Occupied  Cooldown  Setup  Warmup  Setback  Unoccupied
Cooling maximum  Vcool -max Vcool -max Vcool -max 0 0 0
Minimum  Vmin*  0 0 0 0 0

structured_payload_candidate.title: Primary Airflow Setpoint in Cooling State
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: 5.9.5.1 When the Zone State Is Cooling
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Series Fan-Powered Terminal Unit − Constant-Volume Fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: The cooling-loop output is mapped to the active primary airflow setpoint from the minimum endpoint to the cooling maximum endpoint. If supply air temperature is above room temperature, the setpoint is capped at the minimum endpoint. The heating coil is OFF.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Map cooling loop output to primary airflow setpoint between min and cooling max endpoints; if SAT > room temp, limit to min endpoint; heating coil OFF.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote:
The cooling -loop output shall be mapped to the active primary airflow setpoint  from the minimum endpoint to the cooling maximum endpoint.
If supply air temperature from the air handler is greater than room temperature, the active primary airflow setpoint  shall be no higher than the minimum  endpoint.
Heating coil is OFF.

evidence_quote:
The cooling -loop output shall be mapped to the active primary airflow setpoint  from the minimum endpoint to the cooling maximum endpoint.
If supply air temperature from the air handler is greater than room temperature, the active primary airflow setpoint  shall be no higher than the minimum  endpoint.
Heating coil is OFF.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Primary Airflow Setpoint in Deadband State
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: 5.9.5.2 When the Zone State Is Deadband
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Series Fan-Powered Terminal Unit − Constant-Volume Fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: The active primary airflow setpoint is set to the minimum endpoint, and the heating coil is OFF.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Set primary airflow setpoint to minimum endpoint; heating coil OFF.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote:
The active primary airflow setpoint  shall be the minimum endpoint.
Heating  coil is OFF.

evidence_quote:
The active primary airflow setpoint  shall be the minimum endpoint.
Heating  coil is OFF.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Primary Airflow and Discharge Temperature Control in Heating State
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Series Fan-Powered Terminal Unit − Constant-Volume Fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Primary airflow setpoint is the minimum endpoint. Discharge temperature is reset by the heating loop from the current AHU SAT to a maximum of MaxΔT above the space temperature setpoint. The heating coil modulates to maintain discharge temperature at setpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Set primary airflow to minimum; reset DAT from AHU SAT up to MaxΔT above heating setpoint; modulate heating coil to maintain DAT setpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote:
The active primary airflow setpoint shall be the minimum endpoint.
The heating -loop shall reset the discharge temperature from the current AHU SAT setpoint  to a maximum of MaxΔT above space temperature setpoint.
The heating coil shall be modulated to maintain the discharge temperature at setpoint.

evidence_quote:
The active primary airflow setpoint shall be the minimum endpoint.
The heating -loop shall reset the discharge temperature from the current AHU SAT setpoint  to a maximum of MaxΔT above space temperature setpoint.
The heating coil shall be modulated to maintain the discharge temperature at setpoint.

structured_payload_candidate.title: VAV Damper Control
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Series Fan-Powered Terminal Unit − Constant-Volume Fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: The VAV damper modulates to maintain measured airflow at the active primary airflow setpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Always active when zone is operating
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Modulate VAV damper to maintain measured airflow at setpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: The VAV damper shall be modulated to maintain the  measured airflow at setpoint.

evidence_quote: The VAV damper shall be modulated to maintain the  measured airflow at setpoint.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Series Fan Control
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Series Fan-Powered Terminal Unit − Constant-Volume Fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Fan runs when zone state is heating or cooling, or when Zone Group is in Occupied Mode. Before starting the fan, the damper is driven fully closed to prevent reverse rotation. Once the fan is proven ON for 15 seconds, the damper override is released.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Zone State is heating or cooling, or Zone Group is in Occupied Mode
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Run fan; pre-start: close damper fully; after fan proven ON for 15 sec, release damper override.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: Fan shall run whenever zone is in heating  or cooling Zone State , or if the associated Zone Group  is in Occupied Mode . Prior to starting the fan, the damper is first driven fully closed to ensure that the fan is n ot rotating backward.  Once the fan is proven ON for a fixed time delay (15 seconds), the damper override is released.

evidence_quote: Fan shall run whenever zone is in heating  or cooling Zone State , or if the associated Zone Group  is in Occupied Mode . Prior to starting the fan, the damper is first driven fully closed to ensure that the fan is n ot rotating backward.  Once the fan is proven ON for a fixed time delay (15 seconds), the damper override is released.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Low Primary Airflow Alarms
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Series Fan-Powered Terminal Unit − Constant-Volume Fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If measured airflow < 70% of setpoint for 10 minutes while setpoint > 0, generate Level 4 alarm. If < 50% for 10 minutes while setpoint > 0, Level 3 alarm. Alarms suppressed if Importance-Multiplier is 0 for static pressure reset T&R.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Generate alarm as specified; suppress if Importance-Multiplier is 0.
structured_payload_candidate.fault_condition: Measured airflow < 70% of setpoint for 10 min (Level 4); < 50% for 10 min (Level 3)
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote:
If the measured airflow is less than 70% of setpoint  for 10 minutes while setpoint  is greater than zero, generate a Level 4 alarm.
If the measured airflow is less than 50% of setpoint  for 10 minutes while setpoint  is greater than zero, generate a Level 3 alarm.
If a zone has an Importance -Multiplier  of 0 (see Section 5.1.14.2.a.1 ) for its static pressure reset T&R  control loop, low airflow alarms shall be suppressed for that zone.

evidence_quote:
If the measured airflow is less than 70% of setpoint  for 10 minutes while setpoint  is greater than zero, generate a Level 4 alarm.
If the measured airflow is less than 50% of setpoint  for 10 minutes while setpoint  is greater than zero, generate a Level 3 alarm.
If a zone has an Importance -Multiplier  of 0 (see Section 5.1.14.2.a.1 ) for its static pressure reset T&R  control loop, low airflow alarms shall be suppressed for that zone.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Low Discharge Air Temperature Alarms
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Series Fan-Powered Terminal Unit − Constant-Volume Fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If heating hot-water plant is proven ON, and DAT is 8.3°C (15°F) less than setpoint for 10 minutes, generate Level 4 alarm. If 17°C (30°F) less for 10 minutes, Level 3. Suppress if Importance-Multiplier is 0 for hot-water reset T&R.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Generate alarm as specified; suppress if Importance-Multiplier is 0.
structured_payload_candidate.fault_condition: DAT less than setpoint by 8.3°C for 10 min (Level 4) or by 17°C for 10 min (Level 3)
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote:
If heating hot -water plant is proven ON, and the DAT  is 8.3°C (15°F) less than setpoint  for 10 minutes, generate a Level 4 alarm.
If heating hot -water plant is proven ON, and the DAT  is 17°C (30°F) less than setpoint  for 10 minutes, generate a Level 3 alarm.
If a zone has an Importance -Multiplier  of 0 (see Section 5.1.14.2.a.1 ) for its hot-water  reset T&R  control loop, low -DAT  alarms shall be suppressed for that zone.

evidence_quote:
If heating hot -water plant is proven ON, and the DAT  is 8.3°C (15°F) less than setpoint  for 10 minutes, generate a Level 4 alarm.
If heating hot -water plant is proven ON, and the DAT  is 17°C (30°F) less than setpoint  for 10 minutes, generate a Level 3 alarm.
If a zone has an Importance -Multiplier  of 0 (see Section 5.1.14.2.a.1 ) for its hot-water  reset T&R  control loop, low -DAT  alarms shall be suppressed for that zone.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Fan Status Alarm
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Series Fan-Powered Terminal Unit − Constant-Volume Fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If fan status input differs from output command for 15 seconds after a change in output status, generate alarm: Commanded ON, status OFF: Level 2; Commanded OFF, status ON: Level 4.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Generate level 2 alarm if commanded ON and status OFF; level 4 if commanded OFF and status ON.
structured_payload_candidate.fault_condition: Status not matching command for 15 seconds
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote:
Fan alarm is indicated by the status input being  different from the output command after a period of 15 seconds after a change in output status.
a. Commanded ON, status OFF: Level 2
b. Commanded OFF, status ON: Level 4

evidence_quote:
Fan alarm is indicated by the status input being  different from the output command after a period of 15 seconds after a change in output status.
a. Commanded ON, status OFF: Level 2
b. Commanded OFF, status ON: Level 4

structured_payload_candidate.title: Airflow Sensor Calibration Fault
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Series Fan-Powered Terminal Unit − Constant-Volume Fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If fan is OFF and airflow sensor reading exceeds the larger of 10% of Vcool-max or 50 cfm for 30 minutes, generate a Level 3 alarm.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Fan OFF and airflow reading above threshold
structured_payload_candidate.fault_condition: Airflow sensor reading above threshold while fan OFF for 30 minutes
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: If the fan serving the zone is OFF and airflow sensor reading is above the larger of 10% of the cooling maximum airflow setpoint  or 50 cfm for 30 minutes , generate a Level 3 alarm.

evidence_quote: If the fan serving the zone is OFF and airflow sensor reading is above the larger of 10% of the cooling maximum airflow setpoint  or 50 cfm for 30 minutes , generate a Level 3 alarm.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Leaking Damper Fault
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Series Fan-Powered Terminal Unit − Constant-Volume Fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If damper position is 0% and airflow sensor reading exceeds the larger of 10% of Vcool-max or 50 cfm for 10 minutes while fan is proven ON, generate a Level 4 alarm.
structured_payload_candidate.fault_condition: Damper closed (0%) and airflow above threshold for 10 minutes while fan ON
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: If the damper position is 0%,  and airflow sensor reading is above the la rger of 10% of the cooling maximum airflow setpoint  or 50 cfm for 10 minutes while the fan serving the zone is proven ON, generate a Level 4 alarm.

evidence_quote: If the damper position is 0%,  and airflow sensor reading is above the la rger of 10% of the cooling maximum airflow setpoint  or 50 cfm for 10 minutes while the fan serving the zone is proven ON, generate a Level 4 alarm.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Leaking Valve Fault
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Series Fan-Powered Terminal Unit − Constant-Volume Fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If heating valve position is 0% for 15 minutes and DAT exceeds AHU SAT by 3°C (5°F), generate a Level 4 alarm.
structured_payload_candidate.fault_condition: Valve closed (0%) and DAT above AHU SAT by 3°C (5°F) for 15 minutes
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: If the valve position is 0% for 15 minutes , and DAT  is above AHU SAT by 3°C (5°F), generate a  Level 4 alarm.

evidence_quote: If the valve position is 0% for 15 minutes , and DAT  is above AHU SAT by 3°C (5°F), generate a  Level 4 alarm.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Testing/Commissioning Overrides for Series Fan Terminal Unit
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Series Fan-Powered Terminal Unit − Constant-Volume Fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Provide software switches to force: zone airflow to zero, Vcool-max, Vmin; damper full closed/open; heating ON/closed; fan ON/OFF; and reset request-hours accumulator. Overrides interlock at zone-group level per Section 5.4.5.
structured_payload_candidate.commissioning_check: Provide overrides for airflow setpoints, damper, heating, fan, and reset accumulator.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote:
Provide software switches that interlock to a system level point to
a. force  zone airflow setpoint  to zero ,
b. force  zone airflow setpoint  to Vcool -max,
c. force  zone airflow setpoint  to Vmin ,
d. force  damper full closed/open ,
e. force  heating to ON/closed ,
f. turn fan ON/OFF, and
g. reset  request -hours accumulator point to zero (provide one point for each reset type listed in the next section ).
... Each of the following points is interlocked so that they can be overridden together at a zone -group level, per Section 5.4.5 .

evidence_quote:
Provide software switches that interlock to a system level point to
a. force  zone airflow setpoint  to zero ,
b. force  zone airflow setpoint  to Vcool -max,
c. force  zone airflow setpoint  to Vmin ,
d. force  damper full closed/open ,
e. force  heating to ON/closed ,
f. turn fan ON/OFF, and
g. reset  request -hours accumulator point to zero (provide one point for each reset type listed in the next section ).
... Each of the following points is interlocked so that they can be overridden together at a zone -group level, per Section 5.4.5 .

structured_payload_candidate.title: Cooling SAT Reset Requests from Series Fan Terminal Units
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Series Fan-Powered Terminal Unit − Constant-Volume Fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If zone temperature exceeds cooling setpoint by 3°C (5°F) for 2 minutes after suppression, send 3 requests. Else if exceeds by 2°C (3°F) for 2 minutes after suppression, send 2 requests. Else if cooling loop > 95%, send 1 request until < 85%. Else if < 95%, send 0 requests.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Send the specified number of requests based on conditions.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote:
If the zone temperature exceeds the zone’s cooling setpoint  by 3°C (5°F) for 2 minutes and after suppression period due to setpoint  change per Section 5.1.20 , send 3 requests.
Else if the zone temperature exceeds the zone’s cooling setpoint  by 2°C (3°F) for 2 minutes and after suppression period due to setpoint  change per Section 5.1.20 , send 2 requests.
Else if the Cooling Loop  is greater than 95%, send 1 request  until the Cooling Loop  is less than 85%.
Else if the Cooling Loop  is less than 95%, send 0 requests.

evidence_quote:
If the zone temperature exceeds the zone’s cooling setpoint  by 3°C (5°F) for 2 minutes and after suppression period due to setpoint  change per Section 5.1.20 , send 3 requests.
Else if the zone temperature exceeds the zone’s cooling setpoint  by 2°C (3°F) for 2 minutes and after suppression period due to setpoint  change per Section 5.1.20 , send 2 requests.
Else if the Cooling Loop  is greater than 95%, send 1 request  until the Cooling Loop  is less than 85%.
Else if the Cooling Loop  is less than 95%, send 0 requests.
